zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Craon於1212年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，她的父親Amaury I de CRAON38歲，母親Jeanne des Roches18歲。她和Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères至少有1個女兒。她去世於1275年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年63歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of German   Krahn  .

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Craon was born in 1212, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Amaury I de CRAON, was 38 and her mother, Jeanne des Roches, was 18. She had at least 1 daughter with Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. She died in 1275, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Craon est née en 1212, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Amaury I de CRAON, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jeanne des Roches, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. Elle est décédée en 1275, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Craon 1212 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amaury I de CRAON 38 und ihre Mutter Jeanne des Roches 18. Sie hatte mit Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1275 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Craon è nata il nel 1212 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Amaury I de CRAON, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Jeanne des Roches, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. Morì nel 1275, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Craonが1212年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンクラオンで生まれた時，父Amaury I de CRAONは38歳，母Jeanne des Rochesは18歳であった。彼女はRaoul III Seigneur of Fougèresとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1275年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで63歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサヴィグニー-レ-ヴィエウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Craon(이)가 1212년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amaury I de CRAON(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne des Roches(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 서아비그니-레-비우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Craon nasceu em 1212, em Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Amaury I de CRAON, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne des Roches, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. Ela faleceu em 1275, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Craon родилась в 1212 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Amaury I de CRAON было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne des Roches, 18. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. Она умерла в 1275 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности савигни-ле-виеукс, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères. Murió en 1275, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
